segments.parentCue: Point to the letter. Say: 'This sound is mmm. Say it with me: mmm.' Have Kiran say 'mmm' three times.
Point to the letter. Say: 'This sound is sss. Say it with me: sss.' Have Kiran say 'sss' three times.
Point to the letter. Say: 'This sound is aaa. Say it with me: aaa.' Have Kiran say 'aaa' three times.
Run your finger under the word slowly. Say: 'This word is aaammm. Let's say it together: aaammm.' Say it fast: 'am.' Repeat until confident.
Point to the word. Say: 'This says Sam.' Ask: 'Can you say Sam?' Praise any attempt.
Point to the letter. Say: 'What sound is this?' If Kiran says 'aaa,' praise. If not, say: 'This is aaa. Say it with me.'
Point to the letter. Say: 'What sound is this?' Praise correct response. Correct if needed: 'This is mmm.'
Point to the letter. Say: 'What sound is this?' Praise correct response. Correct if needed: 'This is sss.'
Point to the letter. Say: 'This sound is eee. Say it with me: eee.' Have Kiran say 'eee' three times.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'Sound it out with me: aaammm. What word? Am.' Repeat.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'Sound it out: mmmeee. What word? Me.' Repeat until confident.
Point to each word. Read together. Ask Kiran to point to 'me.' Celebrate success.
Point to each letter. Ask: 'What sound?' Go through all four. Praise correct answers, gently correct mistakes.
Point to the letter. Say: 'This sound is t. Say it with me: t.' Have Kiran say 't' three times. Keep it a quick, crisp sound.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'Sound it out: aaat. What word? At.' Repeat.
Run your finger under the word slowly. Say: 'sss-aaa-t. Sat!' Have Kiran try sounding it out.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'mmm-aaa-t. Mat!' Ask: 'What word?' Repeat until confident.
Read the sentence together. Point to each word. Ask: 'Who sat?' Celebrate: 'Sam sat!'
Point to each letter in order. Ask: 'What sound?' Go through all five. Quick pace, praise correct answers.
Point to the letter. Say: 'This sound is rrr. Say it with me: rrr.' Have Kiran say 'rrr' three times.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'rrr-aaa-mmm. Ram!' Have Kiran try it.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'rrr-aaa-t. Rat!' Ask Kiran: 'What word?'
Review word. Run finger under it. 'sss-aaa-mmm. Sam!' Quick review.
Read together. Point to each word. Ask: 'What sat?' (A ram!) Praise.

segments.displayText: m  s  a  e  t  r
segments.parentCue: Quick review of all six sounds. Point and ask: 'What sound?' Aim for fast, confident responses.
Point to the letter. Say: 'This sound is d. Say it with me: d.' Have Kiran say 'd' three times.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'mmm-aaa-d. Mad!' Have Kiran try.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'sss-aaa-d. Sad!' Ask: 'What word?'
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'rrr-eee-aaa-d. Read!' Emphasize the long e sound.
Read each sentence. Point to each word. Ask Kiran to find the word 'rat.' Celebrate!

segments.displayText: e  t  r  d  m  s  a
segments.parentCue: Review all sounds in mixed order. Quick pace. Praise speed and accuracy.
Point to the letters. Say: 'These two letters together say thh. Say it with me: thh.' Have Kiran say 'thh' three times. Show tongue position if helpful.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'thh-aaa-t. That!' Have Kiran try.
Quick review. Sound it out: 'mmm-aaa-t. Mat!'
Quick review. Sound it out: 'sss-aaa-d. Sad!'
Read together. Point to each word. Ask: 'What did Sam do? What did the rat do?' Same answer! Fun!

segments.displayText: th  d  r  t  s  m  a  e
segments.parentCue: Review all sounds including 'th.' Mixed order, quick pace.
Point to the letter. Say: 'This sound is iii (short i, as in "it"). Say it with me: iii.' Have Kiran say 'iii' three times.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'iii-t. It!' Short and quick.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'sss-iii-t. Sit!' Have Kiran try.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'thh-iii-sss. This!' Practice a few times.
Read together. Point to each word. Make it fun — tell Sam to sit! Ask Kiran: 'Can you find the word sit?'

segments.displayText: i  th  e  d  r  a  m  s  t
segments.parentCue: Review all sounds. Include 'th' and short 'i.' Quick pace, celebrate fast answers.
Point to the letter. Say: 'This sound is nnn. Say it with me: nnn.' Have Kiran say 'nnn' three times.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'aaa-nnn. An!' Quick word.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'mmm-aaa-nnn. Man!'
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'rrr-aaa-nnn. Ran!' Ask: 'What word?'
Run your finger under the word. Say: 't-iii-nnn. Tin!'

segments.displayText: A man ran. That man is mad.
segments.parentCue: Read together, pointing to each word. Ask: 'Who ran? Is the man happy or mad?' Have fun with it!

segments.displayText: n  i  th  e  d  r  a  m  s  t
segments.parentCue: Review all sounds. Mixed order. By now Kiran should be getting faster. Praise confidence!
Point to the letter. Say: 'This sound is c (hard c, as in cat). Say it with me: c.' Have Kiran say 'c' three times.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'c-aaa-nnn. Can!' Have Kiran try.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'c-aaa-t. Cat!' Kiran might love this one!
Quick review. 'iii-nnn. In!'

segments.displayText: A cat sat in a tin. That cat is mad.
segments.parentCue: Read together. Ask: 'Where did the cat sit? (In a tin!) Is the cat happy?' Make a mad cat face!

segments.displayText: c  n  i  th  e  d  r  a  m  s  t
segments.parentCue: Full review of all 11 sounds. Go quickly. Celebrate how many Kiran knows!
Point to the letter. Say: 'This sound is ooo (short o, as in not). Say it with me: ooo.' Have Kiran say 'ooo' three times.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'nnn-ooo-t. Not!' Have Kiran try.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'ooo-nnn. On!'
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'c-ooo-t. Cot!' Explain: a small bed.
Run your finger under the word. Say: 'd-ooo-t. Dot!'

segments.displayText: A cat is on a cot. That is not a rat.
segments.parentCue: Read together. Ask: 'Where is the cat? Is it a rat?' (No! Not a rat!) Have fun with the silliness.
